zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de Dampierre於大約1250年出生在比利時納姆爾納姆爾時，她的父親Guy de Dampierre26歲，母親Mathilde de Béthune22歲。她於1273年9月5日與Jan I hertog van Brabant在比利時結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1285年7月3日享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite de Dampierre于大约1250年出生在比利时納姆爾納姆爾时，她的父亲Guy de Dampierre26岁，母亲Mathilde de Béthune22岁。她于1273年9月5日与Jan I hertog van Brabant在比利时结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1285年7月3日享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Dampierre was born about 1250, in Namur, Namur, Belgium, her father, Guy de Dampierre, was 26 and her mother, Mathilde de Béthune, was 22. She married Jan I hertog van Brabant on 5 September 1273, in Belgium. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 3 July 1285, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Dampierre est née environ 1250, à Namur, Namur, Belgique, son père, Guy de Dampierre, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Béthune, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Jan I hertog van Brabant le 5 septembre 1273, à Belgique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 juillet 1285, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de Dampierre um 1250 in Namur, Namen, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guy de Dampierre 26 und ihre Mutter Mathilde de Béthune 22. Sie hat am 5. September 1273 in Belgien Jan I hertog van Brabant geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Juli 1285 im Alter von 36 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Dampierre è nata il circa 1250 nel Namur, Namur, Belgio, sua padre, Guy de Dampierre, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Mathilde de Béthune, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Jan I hertog van Brabant il 5 settembre 1273, nel Belgio. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 3 luglio 1285, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Dampierreが約1250年にベルギーナムルナムルで生まれた時，父Guy de Dampierreは26歳，母Mathilde de Béthuneは22歳であった。1273年9月5日にベルギーでJan I hertog van Brabantと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1285年7月3日に36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Dampierre(이)가 대략 1250년 벨기에 남어 남어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guy de Dampierre(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde de Béthune(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1273년 9월 5일 벨기에에서 Jan I hertog van Brabant(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1285년 7월 3일 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Dampierre nasceu aproximadamente 1250, em Namur, Namur, Bélgica, seu pai, Guy de Dampierre, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Béthune, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Jan I hertog van Brabant em 5 de setembro de 1273, em Bélgica. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de julho de 1285, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Dampierre родилась около 1250 г. в местности намур, намур, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Guy de Dampierre было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Béthune, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Jan I hertog van Brabant 5 сентября 1273 г. в местности Бельгия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 3 июля 1285 г. в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite de Dampierre nació aproximadamente 1250, en Namur, Namur, Bélgica, su papá, Guy de Dampierre, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mathilde de Béthune, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Jan I hertog van Brabant el 5 de septiembre de 1273, en Bélgica. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 3 de julio de 1285, a la edad de 36 años.
